**Source discussion**: `knowledge_base/agentic-ai/discussions/2026-04-16.md`

## PROPOSED CHANGE 3 — Phase 5 Header: Add ADK/A2A HOLD Block (P1)

**Location**: Phase 5 section — insert at the very top before any task lists

**Add**:
```markdown
> **HOLD — No ADK/A2A Integration Until Post-I/O**
>
> Do NOT begin A2A protocol or ADK framework integration until after 2026-05-20.
>
> **Reason**: Google I/O 2026 (May 19-20) expected to announce ADK v2.0 + A2A v1.1.
> Both may introduce breaking changes. Work begun before I/O may need full rewrite.
>
> **Gate removal criteria** (ALL three required):
> 1. Google I/O 2026 passes (after 2026-05-20)
> 2. Post-I/O research sweep confirms A2A v1.1 wire format stable vs. v1.0
> 3. ADK v2.0 public release notes reviewed and KB updated
>
> **Decision frame**: Stay on native Claude Agent SDK subagent calls unless A2A provides
> concrete benefit (mixing Claude + Gemma 4 agents for cost efficiency, or cross-repo
> inter-agent communication). Do not adopt for purity.
>
> **Owner**: factory-steward to evaluate after 2026-05-21 post-I/O sweep.
```

**Source**: proposal 2026-04-16-adk-io-decision-gate.md; discussion Round 3 unanimous adopt (P1).

---

## PROPOSED CHANGE 4 — Phase 5 Design: TCI Calibration Anchors (P1)

**Location**: Phase 5 section — new subsection after the TCI algorithm description

**Add**:
```markdown
#### TCI Threshold Calibration (empirical starting points — validate in 4.2b)

Source: Anthropic multi-agent research system engineering blog, 2026-04-16.

| TCI Score | Agent Count | Tool Calls | Track Decision |
|-----------|-------------|------------|----------------|
| ≤ 2 | 1 agent | 3-10 tool calls | Track A (parallel) |
| 3-6 | 2-9 agents | mixed | Evaluation required |
| ≥ 7 | 10+ agents | divided responsibilities | Track B (single flagship) |

**Note**: Thresholds calibrated from Anthropic's document synthesis + web search task
distribution. Our task distribution (skill gen, eval, optimize, deploy) may differ.
Validate against actual Phase 5 task distribution in 4.2b stress test data before
finalizing algorithm. Label these as "empirical starting points", not derived constants.
```

**Source**: proposal 2026-04-16-tci-calibration-anchors.md; discussion Round 1 unanimous adopt (P1).

---

## PROPOSED CHANGE 5 — Phase 5.3: External Session State Store Requirement (P1)

**Location**: Phase 5 section — new task in Phase 5.3

**Add**:
```markdown
#### 5.3 External Task State Store (crash-recovery contract)
- [ ] Phase 5 topology-aware-router MUST store task state in durable external log before
  dispatching subagents. Fields: task ID, description, TCI score, routing decision,
  subagent assignments, completed phase log, resume point.
- [ ] Implementation: append-only `logs/phase5_task_state.jsonl`
- [ ] Resume flag: `--resume-task-id <id>` to restart from last completed phase
- [ ] Source: Anthropic multi-agent blog (external memory for context survival) + Phase 5 requirement.
  Groundwork laid: `session_log.sh` + `workflow-state-convergence.md` (see DEFER table 2026-04-16)
```

**Source**: proposal 2026-04-16-tci-calibration-anchors.md; analysis §1.1.

---

## PROPOSED CHANGE 6 — Phase 5 Discovery Interface Abstraction Note (P2)

**Location**: Phase 5 section — append to architecture notes

**Add**:
```markdown
#### Discovery Interface Abstraction (forward-compatibility for MCP Server Cards)

The Phase 5 router MUST expose an `AgentDiscovery` interface separating discovery from routing:
```
list_agents() → List[AgentCapabilities]
```
- Current implementation: reads `.claude/agents/*.md` frontmatter (single canonical source)
- Upgrade path: replace implementation with `.well-known` Server Cards query when spec published
- Do NOT create `agents_registry.json` until: (a) Server Cards spec published AND (b) cross-repo
  discovery is a concrete requirement

Source: proposal 2026-04-16-server-cards-discovery-interface.md.
```

---

## PROPOSED CHANGE 7 — Phase 4 Eval Infrastructure: MCP False-Positive Tests (P2)

**Location**: Phase 4 → eval infrastructure tasks (or Phase 2.4 Benchmark Dataset continuation)

**Add**:
```markdown
- [ ] **G20**: 5 MCP ecosystem false-positive tests (test_60-64) — prompts using MCP vocabulary
  that should NOT trigger meta-agent-factory: configure/debug/update/rate-limit/integrate MCP server.
  Sequence: add tests → update splits.json (T=44) → run `--update-baseline` → verify negatives pass → commit.
  Source: proposal 2026-04-16-mcp-falsepositive-tests.md.
```

## PROPOSED CHANGE 8 — Phase 4 Eval Infrastructure: Passive Case Extractor (P2)

**Location**: Phase 4 → eval infrastructure tasks

**Add**:
```markdown
- [ ] **passive_case_extractor.py** (post-Phase-4-close): `scripts/passive_case_extractor.py`
  reads `logs/skill_usage.jsonl`, runs candidates through `run_eval_async.py --single-test`
  for behavioral novelty detection, writes to `pending_cases/YYYY-MM-DD/`.
  Prereq: write `pending_cases/README.md` format spec first.
  Source: proposal 2026-04-16-passive-case-extractor.md.
- [ ] Add `pending_cases/` count to `health_dashboard.py` output (after passive extractor ships).
```

## PROPOSED CHANGE 9 — Phase 6: Mythos Model Readiness Note (P3)

**Location**: Phase 6 section — append readiness note

**Add**:
```markdown
#### Mythos Model Eval Readiness (when public API ships)

When `claude-mythos-preview-*` becomes publicly available:
1. Verify `eval/run_eval_async.py --model <model-id>` flag works (see skill-updates-2026-04-16)
2. Run: `python eval/run_eval_async.py --model claude-mythos-preview-XXXX --skill .claude/agents/meta-agent-factory.md`
3. Log results to `eval/experiment_log.json` as `model_comparison` experiment type
4. Compare vs. Opus 4.6 baseline on trigger accuracy + convergence speed

Expected benefit: if Mythos achieves ≥ 90% trigger rate on first-attempt generation,
optimizer iterations may be needed less frequently — shorter end-to-end pipeline time.
Cost tradeoff unknown until pricing announced.

Source: analysis 2026-04-16 §1.4; discussion Round 3 adopt P3.
```
